findings.evidence: The PDF header contains a left-aligned block (names and titles) and a center-aligned block (state seal, department name, date). The HTML collapses these into a single vertical sequence of text, losing the distinct visual grouping.
The PDF contains the North Carolina state seal at the top, a graphic signature for David Miller, and a DEQ logo at the bottom. None of these images are present in the HTML.
The PDF includes graphic signatures for Brian Wrenn and Brenda Harris, along with a handwritten date entry. These graphical elements are entirely missing from the HTML.

findings.description: Graphical elements and signature images were not extracted.
findings.evidence: The source PDF contains the NC State Seal, the DEQ logo, and three handwritten signatures (David Miller, Brian Wrenn, Brenda Harris). The HTML does not contain any tags to represent these visual elements, though all adjacent text and handwritten dates were correctly captured.
